item.title: Lessons Learned from Building an MCP Client
item.description: Takeaways from building a Java-based MCP client and CLI on top of LangChain4J.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Building Super Slim Containerized Lambdas on AWS - Revisited
item.description: Revisiting techniques for minimizing AWS Lambda container image size, with a sustainability angle.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: How to Build a BlueSky RSS-like Bot with AWS Lambda and Terraform
item.description: Building a serverless BlueSky bot that reposts RSS feed entries using AWS Lambda and Terraform.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: About AWS AI Practitioner (Beta) Exam
item.description: My experience taking the AWS AI Practitioner certification during its beta phase.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Recertification and the Current State of AWS Exams
item.description: My experience recertifying AWS Professional exams and how the exams have changed.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Terragrunt for Multi-Region/Multi-Account Deployments
item.description: Why and how we adopted Terragrunt to manage Terraform across multiple AWS regions and accounts.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Fluent Bit with ECS: Configuration Tips and Tricks
item.description: Practical Fluent Bit configuration tips learned from running it with ECS in production.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Why I Am Not Able to Remove a Security Group?
item.description: Why Terraform sometimes cannot delete a security group attached to a VPC Lambda, and how to handle it.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Expose our REST API on AWS with a Custom Domain
item.description: A practical guide to exposing an AWS REST API behind a custom domain name with Route 53 and ACM.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: An Introduction to AWS Batch
item.description: An overview of AWS Batch components and how to run containerized batch workloads on AWS.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: About OCP Exams
item.description: My experience preparing for and taking the Oracle Certified Professional Java exams.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: AWS Lambda Extensions with Rust
item.description: How to build external AWS Lambda extensions in Rust to hook into the function lifecycle.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Certificate Parsing with domain-recon
item.description: Using domain-recon, an open-source Rust tool, to enumerate domains and subdomains via SSL certificates.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Containers: Under the Hood
item.description: A deep dive into what containers really are and the Linux primitives that power them.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Electrify your NodeJS AWS Lambdas with Rust
item.description: Speeding up NodeJS Lambda functions by calling Rust native addons via Neon and FFI.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Building Super Slim Containerized Lambdas on AWS
item.description: Techniques to drastically reduce the size of containerized AWS Lambda images, focused on Rust.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Running Serverless Lambdas with Rust on AWS
item.description: Building and deploying AWS Lambda functions written in Rust on the custom runtime.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: GCP Associate Cloud Engineer Certification Experience
item.description: My experience preparing for and taking the GCP Associate Cloud Engineer exam online.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: Deploy Containers with App Runner
item.description: Deploying containerized web apps on AWS App Runner straight from GitHub or ECR.
item.author: ervin_szilagh[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)

item.title: AWS Lambda Graceful Shutdown
item.description: Implementing graceful shutdown in AWS Lambda to clean up resources like database connections.
item.author: ervin_szilagyi[at]outlook.com (Ervin Szilagyi)
